subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the truth and enthralled by the Beloved of the horizons, thy letter hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت و مجذوب دلبر آفاق نامه شما رسید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @kindness to and rights of animals
